summary: The user requested interesting facts about various food items, providing multiple lists that included ice cream flavors, prawns, profiteroles, and various chicken products. The assistant provided concise facts for each item, and the user clarified their requests throughout the session.
facts: The user provided a list of food items including Vanilla Flavour Soft Scoop Ice Cream, White Vanilla Flavour Soft Scoop Ice Cream, Strawberry Flavour Soft Scoop Ice Cream, Chocolate Flavour Soft Scoop Ice Cream, Large Cold Water Prawns, Medium Cold Water Prawns, Profiteroles, and Profiteroles with Chocolate Sauce. The user later provided another list that included Mint Crisps, Mint Cremes, Formidable Fudge Cake, Baked Beans in Tomato Sauce, Baked Beans in Tomato Sauce Reduced Sugar & Salt, Frozen Diced Chicken Breast 12mm, Battered Mini Chicken Fillets, and Frozen Chicken Breast Strips 12mm. The user requested shorter bullet points while retaining the facts about the food items.
